DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA N.A.'S ("B OF A'S") MOTION TO DEEM REQUESTS FOR ADMISSIONS ADMITTED IS GRANTED AS UNOPPOSED. B OF A DECLINED TO REQUEST MONETARY SANCTIONS AND THUS SAID SANCTIONS ARE DENIED AS UNSOUGHT. ANY OTHER SANCTIONS, IF ANY, ARE DENIED. B OF A SHALL TIMELY PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER REPEATING VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COURT'S RULING IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312 TO JUDGE PRO TEM DOUGLAS ROBBINS BY EMAIL AT DROBBINS@WOODROBBINS.COM. JUDGE PRO TEM: DOUGLAS ROBBINS; CLERK: WILLIAM TRUPEK; NOT REPORTED. (302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion To Deem Request For Admissions Admitted
Off Calendar Nov-27-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Plaintiff Bank of America N.A.'s ("B of A's") Motion to Deem Requests for Admissions Admitted is GRANTED AS UNOPPOSED. B of A declined to request monetary sanctions and thus said sanctions are DENIED AS UNSOUGHT. Any other sanctions, if any, are DENIED. B of A shall timely prepare and submit a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling in compliance with CRC 3.1312 to Judge Pro Tem Douglas Robbins by email at drobbins@woodrobbins.com. Judge Pro Tem: Douglas Robbins; Clerk: William Trupek; Not reported. (302/JPT)
